MINI MINUTES: Dept. 304 - Oct 23, 2003

On Calendar: Ex Parte (Stipulated) Request re Discovery & Scheduling

Proceedings Not reported.

Present: Judge Richard A. Kramer, Clerk Jose Rios-Merida, Counsel Alison Hightower, Donlad W. Rees, Steve Bitter, Kurt W. Melchior.

Conference held. Parties report that new documents have been found which necessitate continuance of trial date. Parties will submit order revising pretrial proceedings/scheduling.

The Phase I trial dates of November 18 and 19, 2003 are advanced and vacated.

Phase I Court trial is set for Monday, December 15, 2003 at 10:30 a.m. Trial shall cover two areas: 1) What policies must be exhausted before the underlying insurance policy kicks in. 2) To what extent can the defendant insurance company look beyond payments to question the propriety of payment. Trial briefs are due two court days before. The defendants are to prepare the order.
